methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=5, map_points=44000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=59/107, rejected=48, seed fallbacks=70. ScanContext hits=37/107, top_k=5, NDT candidates evaluated=39, mean distance=0.0686.
